title: dolichos obtusifolius
intro: Dolichos obtusifolius, also known as the African horned cucumber, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dolichos obtusifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
